title: fabripty
description: The modpack is designed to optimize and provide a comfortable and convenient game
body:
The pack is designed to optimize and provide a comfortable and convenient game

This modpack includes such mods as:

* Essential
* Xaeros world map
* Simple voice chat
* Paperdoll
* Blur 
* Falling leaves
* Emotecraft
* Iris 
* visuality
* notenoughanimations
* betterstats
* sodium 
* and more other!
